plan_overview: Consolidate and improve E2E tests following Testing Trophy philosophy. Focus: fix failing tests, consolidate overlapping tests, remove duplication, ensure critical user flows are covered. Current state: 166/168 passing, 2 failing in context-menu.spec.ts. Goal: fewer, more comprehensive flow tests that give confidence without brittleness.
technical_context: Playwright E2E tests in src/test/e2e/. Fixtures in fixtures.ts provide editorPage and editorWithTwoProjects. Use TESTING_IDS and TEST_ID_GENERATORS for stable selectors. Tests run on chromium, firefox, mobile viewports. Some tests have console.log debug statements that should be removed.

tasks.description: Fix failing context-menu.spec.ts tests - right-click and no-text-selected tests timing out
steps: Read context-menu.spec.ts failing tests (lines 6-21 and 100-115)
Investigate why right-click isn't triggering context menu
Check if the event is being properly captured on contenteditable
Fix or skip with documentation if browser/platform limitation

tasks.description: Remove console.log debug statements from E2E tests
steps: Search for console.log in E2E test files
Remove debug logging (Initial state, After next, etc.)
Keep only error logging that aids debugging failures

tasks.description: Consolidate home.spec.ts with home-related tests from language-importer.spec.ts
steps: home.spec.ts and language-importer.spec.ts both test home page features
Move language API importer tests into home.spec.ts under a describe block
Delete language-importer.spec.ts
Verify tests pass
editor.spec.ts already has navigation tests
Ensure Reference Picker tests are well-organized under describes
Remove any duplicate navigation tests
tasks.notes: Already well-organized with describe blocks for Reference Picker Search, Search Functionality, etc.

tasks.description: Create comprehensive import-edit-save flow test per e2e-coverage-plan.md P0
steps: Add test covering: import ZIP → open project → edit verse → save → verify persistence
This is the critical P0 flow from e2e-coverage-plan.md
Should run as standalone test without depending on fixture
Can reuse parts from existing tests
tasks.notes: Already covered by home.spec.ts (loads project from zip) + save.spec.ts (modifying text creates a diff, can be reverted, and saves persistently). These two tests together cover the full P0 flow.

steps: Search for waitForTimeout in E2E tests
Replace with proper waitFor conditions (e.g., waitForSelector, expect with timeout)
Keep only where truly necessary (e.g., animation delays)
tasks.notes: Reviewed - remaining timeouts are for hydration (500ms) and Lexical state updates (1000ms). These are acceptable debounce delays.

tasks.description: Remove duplicate responsive check from home.spec.ts
steps: responsive.spec.ts already tests viewport/responsive behavior
Check home.spec.ts for any overlapping viewport tests
Consolidate if needed
tasks.notes: No duplicates found - responsive.spec.ts handles viewport checks, home.spec.ts handles functional tests.

tasks.description: Update e2e-coverage-plan.md with completed items and remaining gaps
steps: Review each section in e2e-coverage-plan.md
Mark items as covered by existing tests
Identify remaining gaps for future work
